headline: Strategic angle — ESG narrative differentiation via proactive disclosure and pivot to EU/domestic green markets
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, TCFD frameworks triggered; increased SEBI scrutiny and disclosure obligations.
ESG score gap may widen versus global peers due to trade barriers and potential index exclusion if US exposure is material.
Potential impact on workforce if export volumes fall; community impact limited at this stage.
action: Immediate risk mitigation and disclosure required; strategic review of export markets and compliance posture advised.
Opportunity: ESG narrative differentiation via proactive disclosure and pivot to EU/domestic green markets
